Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/data.json'\); for\(const r of d.regions\){const cells=[...r.industry,...r.macro,...r.driver]; const a=cells.filter\(c=>c.auto\).length; console.log\(r.name.padEnd\(10\), 'auto', a+'/'+cells.length, '| CLI:', JSON.stringify\(r.macro.find\(x=>x.nm==='景气先行CLI'\)?.value\), '| 出口:', JSON.stringify\(r.driver.find\(x=>x.nm==='出口外需'\)?.value\), '| 实际利率:', JSON.stringify\(r.macro.find\(x=>x.nm==='实际利率'\)?.value\)\);}")
